title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zomato in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
